title: fragaria vesca var. roseiflora
intro: Fragaria vesca var. roseiflora, also known as the rose-leaf wood strawberry or woodland strawberry, is a variant of the wild strawberry plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its high content of antioxidants and salicylic acid. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca var. roseiflora include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of heart disease, and protect against certain types of cancer. Fragaria vesca var. roseiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, salve, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible addition to various natural health regimens.
